title: TheRealReal (REAL) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: The RealReal's analyst consensus shows a strong buy rating based on 9 Wall Street analysts covering the stock. Average price target is $18.19, with a high of $20.00 and a low of $16.00, implying 93.51% upside potential from current levels. Earnings forecast: RealReal is forecast to grow earnings by 92.3% per annum and revenue by 9.8% per annum. EPS is expected to grow by 94.4% per annum. Consensus forecast suggests the company will achieve profitability with net income of US$29.8m in 2026, representing significant improvement from prior year expectations. Recent analyst activity shows mixed signals with some target price reductions from $18.50-$20 to $13-$17 following the Q1 earnings announcement, though the fundamental buy thesis remains intact. Analyst commentary emphasizes the sustainability of 24% GMV growth, the durability of average order value increases, and confidence in management's ability to expand margins through AI automation and operational leverage. Key analyst questions focus on the sustainability of premium category demand, competitive positioning versus ThreadUp and eBay, and the timeline to sustainable profitability. The consensus view remains constructive on the company's long-term growth prospects driven by expanding luxury resale market and operational improvements.
